description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a series of build jobs for CentOS 7 CUDA installer images, each using the docker-multi-arch runner tag. For every CUDA version (e.g., 11.0.3, 11.1.1, 11.2.2, 11.3.1, 11.4.3, 11.5.2, 11.6.1, 11.6.2, 11.7.1, 11.8.0, 12.0.0, 12.0.1, 12.1.0, 12.1.1, 12.2.0, 12.2.2, 12.3.0, 12.3.1, 12.3.2, 12.4.0) add a job named centos7_<cuda_version>_only that runs in the build stage, sets the variables ARCHES=x86_64, CUDA_VERSION, DIST_BASE_PATH, IMAGE_NAME (pointing to gitlab‑master.nvidia.com:5005/cuda‑installer/cuda or the release‑candidate path for 12.3+), MANIFEST=manifests/cuda.yaml, OS=centos7, OS_NAME=centos, OS_VERSION=7, and is triggered only when the matching CI variable (e.g., $centos7_11_0_3) and $all are true. Each job inherits a common template that builds the Docker image for the specified CUDA version and pushes it to the internal registry, but the explicit script commands are omitted in the snippet. The pipeline does not define additional stages, caches, or artifacts beyond these build jobs.
